name: Glass Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Pink - Cloud Island™
description: Add a beautiful glow to any nightstand, dresser or reading nook with this Pink Glass Table Lamp from cloud island™. In soft pink, this charming table lamp showcases a lovely glass construction on a sturdy metal pedestal base. With a crisp drum shade and a beautifully shaped silhouette, this elegant glass lamp is an accent piece that'll brighten up any space in your home.
